items.name: Premium Meltique Sirloin
items.description: 250g sirloin, seared medium-rare with herb butter. Tender, juicy, plated with roasted vegetables and mashed potato.

items.name: Ribeye Steak
items.description: Marbled ribeye, char-grilled to your liking. Served with black pepper sauce and seasonal greens.

items.name: Tenderloin Steak
items.description: Lean, melt-in-your-mouth tenderloin with mushroom sauce and garlic bread.

items.name: Lamb Chop
items.description: The reason most people came the first time. Tender, marinated, plated with care. Pairs with everything.

items.name: Grilled Lamb Shoulder
items.description: Slow-grilled lamb shoulder with rosemary and mint sauce. Generous portion for sharing.

items.name: Seafood Olio
items.description: Aglio olio with prawns, squid, and mussels. Garlic, chili flakes, olive oil — simple and addictive.

items.name: Chicken Carbonara
items.description: Creamy carbonara with grilled chicken, parmesan, and crispy beef bacon bits.

items.name: Bolognese
items.description: Classic beef bolognese slow-cooked in tomato sauce over al dente spaghetti.

items.name: Beef Burger
items.description: Juicy beef patty with cheddar, lettuce, tomato, and Ryndu special sauce. Served with fries.

items.name: Chicken Burger
items.description: Crispy fried chicken thigh with coleslaw and spicy mayo. A crowd favourite.

items.name: Lamb Burger
items.description: Grilled lamb patty with mint yoghurt and caramelised onions.

items.name: Club Sandwich
items.description: Triple-decker with chicken, egg, lettuce, tomato, and cheese. Served with fries.

items.name: Chicken Wrap
items.description: Grilled chicken strips with lettuce, tomato, and garlic sauce in a warm tortilla.

items.name: Beef Kuetiau
items.description: Silky flat rice noodles stir-fried with tender beef slices, egg, and bean sprouts in dark soy. Local fusion bestseller.

items.name: Nasi Goreng Ayam
items.description: Fried rice with spiced chicken, egg, and sambal belacan. Malaysian comfort food done right.

items.name: Mee Goreng
items.description: Yellow noodles tossed in spicy tomato gravy with chicken, potatoes, and tofu.

items.name: Mashed Potato
items.description: Creamy butter mashed potato with gravy.

items.name: French Fries
items.description: Crispy golden fries, lightly salted.

items.name: Coleslaw
items.description: Fresh cabbage and carrot slaw in creamy dressing.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie
items.description: Warm, fudgy chocolate brownie. Free on your birthday — just let us know!

items.name: Ice Cream Scoop
items.description: Vanilla or chocolate. Simple, cold, perfect after a grilled meal.

items.name: Fresh Orange Juice
items.description: Squeezed fresh, no added sugar.

items.name: Iced Lemon Tea
items.description: Brewed tea with fresh lemon slices.

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.description: Coca-Cola, Sprite, Fanta.

items.name: Mineral Water
items.description: Chilled bottled water.
